change.head: demo-confirmed-change
change.summary: Renew only unexpired accounts and perform an eligible renewal once

intent.statement: Reject accounts at or after expiry; charge an eligible renewal exactly once

evidence.supports: The human confirmed the expiry boundary and exactly-once side effect

decisions.question: Is an account eligible at the exact expiry instant?
Should an eligible renewal charge the account?

invariants.statement: Expired accounts are never charged or marked renewed
Retrying a completed renewal does not charge again

required.statement: The first eligible renewal charges the account once

prohibited.statement: Expired or already-renewed accounts must not be charged
